case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL VS WILLIAMS, RENITA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,637.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION - DEPT. OF HUMAN SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, RENITA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-30-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
